problems_encountered.description: SSH public key file not found: /home/nodejs/.ssh/eval-test/eval-import-test.pub - MCP server runs remotely on Fly.io, cannot access local filesystem

tool_response_summary: Failed - file not found on remote server
execution_notes: Tool expects file in server's ~/.ssh directory. Since MCP server is remote (Fly.io), it cannot access local client files. This tool would work if SSH keys existed on the server's filesystem.
